reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Beautiful place. Clean. Very good facilities. Clean bathrooms with hot showers. Dishwashing sinks with hot water. Barbecue grill. Power outlets. Wi-fi. We paid 18,000 Argentine pesos for two people and slept in the car. We saw people in motorhomes, trailers, motorcycles, bicycles, and they also accept dogs.

(Original)
Local bonito. Limpo. Muito boa estrutura. Banheiros limpos com ducha com água quente. Pias lavar louça c água quente. Churrasqueira. Pontos de energia. Wi-fi. Pagamos 18 mil pesos argentinos por duas pessoas e dormimos no carro. Vimos aqui : pessoas de motorhomes , trailers, motos , bicicletas e também aceitam cachorros.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURvay1DdVJBEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente el personal!! Principalmente, se ocupan de ayudarte, más a las personas mayores. Además al ser celíaca quedas limitado en la mayoría de los lugares excepto a desayunar, en ACA, estamos incluidos.

(Translated by Google)
The staff is excellent! They're especially helpful, particularly to older people. Also, being celiac limits you in most places except for breakfast, which is included at ACA.

reviewReply.comment: Hola Fabiana. Muchas gracias por tu devolución, son m7y alentadores tus palabras. Te esperamos cuanso quieras

reviews.comment:
Terrible las filas para cargar y solo uno o dos playeros!!¡

(Translated by Google)
The lines to load up were terrible, and there were only one or two attendants!

reviewReply.comment: En los horarios picos hay 3 playeros. Te recomiendo, para no hacer tanta cola, venir en horarios de menos concurrencia. Podes usar la herramiento de google para saber como estamos trabajo

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) There was no fuel and a waiting line to refuel, and it took 2 hours for the fuel truck to fill the gas pumps' tanks ⛽🤔

(Original)
Não tinha combustível e com fila de espera para abastecer e levou 2:00 horas para o caminhão de combustível encher o tanque das bombas de gasolina ⛽🤔

reviewReply.comment: Hola Silvana, mil disculpas pero es proceso que no.lo podemos acelerar. Lamentablemente lleva tiempo. Una lastima tu calificación por esto.
